item.dc:creator: Greg Rosenstein
item.description: Pulisic, the face of the U.S. men’s national team, talks about feeling pressure to deliver World Cup success on home soil.

media:content.media:text: Christian Pulisic sits on a chair next to a pool table inside of a red-themed sports room
media:content.media:description: U.S. and AC Milan soccer star Christian Pulisic at Milanello Sports Center in Italy on Feb. 8.

media:content.media:text: Christian Pulisic poses for a portrait while seated in a chair
media:content.media:description: U.S. and AC Milan soccer star Christian Pulisic at Milanello Sports Center in Italy on Feb. 8.

media:content.media:text: U.S. midfielder Christian Pulisic
media:content.media:description: U.S. and AC Milan soccer star Christian Pulisic at Milanello Sports Center in Italy on Feb. 8.

item.title: Christian Pulisic has played under pressure before, but nothing like this World Cup

item.dc:creator: Yuliya Talmazan
item.description: The World Cup opened with jubilation in Mexico City as a packed stadium roared the hosts to victory.

media:content.media:text: Korea Republic v Czechia: Group A - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: General view inside the stadium as Matej Kovar #1 of Czechia passes the ball during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match between Korea Republic and Czechia at Guadalajara Stadium on June 11, 2026 in Guadalajara, Mexico.

media:content.media:text: Korea Republic v Czechia: Group A - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: The crowd that did show was primarily backing South Korea, and delighted in the comeback win.

media:content.media:text: Korea Republic v Czechia: Group A - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Guadalajara is a city with a deep-rooted football culture.

media:content.media:text: Korea Republic v Czechia: Group A - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: The game saw all three goals scored in the second half, with the Cezchs taking the lead from a long throw before the Koreans came back.

item.title: Empty seats on World Cup’s opening day renew ticket price concerns

item.description: Debieron transcurrir tes mundiales para que el delantero mexicano pudiera ver portería y no pudo contener la emoción tras marcarle a Sudáfrica.

media:content.media:title: El gol y las lágrimas de Raúl Jiménez son lo Mejor de Día
media:content.media:description: Debieron transcurrir tes mundiales para que el delantero mexicano pudiera ver portería y no pudo contener la emoción tras marcarle a Sudáfrica.

item.title: El gol y las lágrimas de Raúl Jiménez son lo Mejor de Día

item.description: Fue una gran exhibición en un ambiente de fiesta en el Estadio Azteca para dar arranque a esta Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. El equipo de Javier Aguirre se llevó tres puntos importantes.

media:content.media:title: Raúl Jiménez y Quiñones impulsan el triunfo de México ante Sudáfrica
media:content.media:description: Fue una gran exhibición en un ambiente de fiesta en el Estadio Azteca para dar arranque a esta Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. El equipo de Javier Aguirre se llevó tres puntos importantes.

item.title: Raúl Jiménez y Quiñones impulsan el triunfo de México ante Sudáfrica

item.description: El equipo de Javier Aguirre debutó con triunfo ante Sudáfrica y se fue a la cima del Grupo A, mientras Corea del Sur le sigue tras su remontada ante Chequia. La afición mexicana enloqueció y festejó por todo el mundo.

media:content.media:title: México líder: así quedó el Grupo A tras el primer día del Mundial | Todo el Mundial
media:content.media:description: El equipo de Javier Aguirre debutó con triunfo ante Sudáfrica y se fue a la cima del Grupo A, mientras Corea del Sur le sigue tras su remontada ante Chequia. La afición mexicana enloqueció y festejó por todo el mundo.

item.title: México líder: así quedó el Grupo A tras el primer día del Mundial | Todo el Mundial

item.description: Así se vivió la fiesta desde las gradas en el Estadio Guadalajara, durante el partido del Mundial 2026 entre República de Corea y Chequia. Los asiáticos se ganaron el corazón de México entonando el Cielito Lindo y sumándose a la icónica ola.

media:content.media:title: Con bigote y sombrero: aficionados coreanos cantan Cielito Lindo y conquistan Guadalajara
media:content.media:description: Así se vivió la fiesta desde las gradas en el Estadio Guadalajara, durante el partido del Mundial 2026 entre República de Corea y Chequia. Los asiáticos se ganaron el corazón de México entonando el Cielito Lindo y sumándose a la icónica ola.

item.title: Con bigote y sombrero: aficionados coreanos cantan Cielito Lindo y conquistan Guadalajara

item.description: El conjunto asiático protagonizó una vibrante voltereta ante República Checa en el Estadio Guadalajara con goles de Hwang In-Beom y Oh Hwang y Oh, con lo que se va a la cima del Grupo A junto a México con tres puntos en inicio del Mundial 2026.

media:content.media:title: Corea del Sur firma emocionante remontada ante Chequia en su debut en el Mundial 2026
media:content.media:description: El conjunto asiático protagonizó una vibrante voltereta ante República Checa en el Estadio Guadalajara con goles de Hwang In-Beom y Oh Hwang y Oh, con lo que se va a la cima del Grupo A junto a México con tres puntos en inicio del Mundial 2026.

item.title: Corea del Sur firma emocionante remontada ante Chequia en su debut en el Mundial 2026

item.description: Los estadios, las calles y las plazas fueron muestra de alegría, tradición y pasión en el debut de la Selección Mexicana en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

media:content.media:title: Desde el Cielito Lindo hasta el Chapulín Colorado los fanáticos mexicanos se hicieron presentes
media:content.media:description: Los estadios, las calles y las plazas fueron muestra de alegría, tradición y pasión en el debut de la Selección Mexicana en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

item.title: Desde el Cielito Lindo hasta el Chapulín Colorado los fanáticos mexicanos se hicieron presentes

item.description: Hwang In-Beom colgó el balón para Hyeon-Gyu Oh, quien condujo por el lateral derecho del área y remató con la zurda para firmar la remontada del cuadro asiático ante República Checa al minuto 80, en su debut en el Mundial 2026.

media:content.media:title: Gol de Oh Hyeon-Gyu para el segundo y la voltereta de Corea del Sur ante Chequia
media:content.media:description: Hwang In-Beom colgó el balón para Hyeon-Gyu Oh, quien condujo por el lateral derecho del área y remató con la zurda para firmar la remontada del cuadro asiático ante República Checa al minuto 80, en su debut en el Mundial 2026.

item.title: Gol de Oh Hyeon-Gyu para el segundo y la voltereta de Corea del Sur ante Chequia

item.description: Kang-In Lee conectó un pase magistral para que In-Beom Hwang rematara picado sobre Kovár y pusiera el empate para el conjunto asiático ante los europeos en su presentación en la Copa del Mundo desde el Estadio Guadalajara.

media:content.media:title: ¡Golazo de Corea del Sur! Hwang In-Beom empata ante Chequia en el debut mundialista
media:content.media:description: Kang-In Lee conectó un pase magistral para que In-Beom Hwang rematara picado sobre Kovár y pusiera el empate para el conjunto asiático ante los europeos en su presentación en la Copa del Mundo desde el Estadio Guadalajara.

item.title: ¡Golazo de Corea del Sur! Hwang In-Beom empata ante Chequia en el debut mundialista

item.description: Infantino vibra con el Azteca en los ojos del mundo y Aguirre goza el debut destacando la mejora de Edson Álvarez. Jiménez resta importancia a la titularidad priorizando al grupo, mientras Ronaldo elige a España y Francia como favoritas al Mundial.

media:content.media:title: Emoción absoluta de organizadores y del ‘Tri’ previo al inicio del Mundial 2026
media:content.media:description: Infantino vibra con el Azteca en los ojos del mundo y Aguirre goza el debut destacando la mejora de Edson Álvarez. Jiménez resta importancia a la titularidad priorizando al grupo, mientras Ronaldo elige a España y Francia como favoritas al Mundial.

item.title: Emoción absoluta de organizadores y del ‘Tri’ previo al inicio del Mundial 2026

item.description: Declaraciones del Tri: Quiñones exige mantener el ímpetu; Alvarado celebra su asistencia a Jiménez y Reyes pide contundencia. Lira aplaude la efectividad en la recuperación y todos los jugadores agradecen el emotivo e incondicional apoyo de la afición.

media:content.media:title: La Selección Mexicana comparte su emoción tras el partido
media:content.media:description: Declaraciones del Tri: Quiñones exige mantener el ímpetu; Alvarado celebra su asistencia a Jiménez y Reyes pide contundencia. Lira aplaude la efectividad en la recuperación y todos los jugadores agradecen el emotivo e incondicional apoyo de la afición.

item.title: La Selección Mexicana comparte su emoción tras el partido

item.description: President Trump said an agreement to end the war could be signed with the Iranian regime within days, but that some thorny issues would remain for later talks. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

media:content.media:title: Trump says deal with Iran could be signed in days
media:content.media:description: President Trump said an agreement to end the war could be signed with the Iranian regime within days, but that some thorny issues would remain for later talks. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

item.title: Trump says deal with Iran could be signed in days

item.dc:creator: Alexander Smith
item.description: The iconic British contemporary artist David Hockney has died, his publicist said Friday.

media:content.media:text: Portrait Of David Hockney
media:content.media:description: David Hockney in his home in Los Angeles in 1987.

media:content.media:text: David Hockney exhibition in New York
media:content.media:description: David Hockney in his home in Los Angeles in 1987.

item.title: David Hockney, giant of British contemporary art, dies aged 88

item.description: Hundreds of drivers lined up at gas stations in Crimea amid a rationing scheme introduced to manage fuel shortages on the Russian-occupied peninsula. Crimea began suffering fuel shortages after Ukraine started targeting one of the main highways linking the peninsula to the Russian mainland.

media:content.media:title: Russian-occupied Crimea suffers fuel shortages after Ukrainian attacks
media:content.media:description: Hundreds of drivers lined up at gas stations in Crimea amid a rationing scheme introduced to manage fuel shortages on the Russian-occupied peninsula. Crimea began suffering fuel shortages after Ukraine started targeting one of the main highways linking the peninsula to the Russian mainland.

item.title: Russian-occupied Crimea suffers fuel shortages after Ukrainian attacks

item.dc:creator: Erik Ortiz
Abigail Brooks
item.description: Lee’s case became the latest to test the legality of nitrogen gas executions. A lower court had ruled the method is unconstitutionally cruel.

media:content.media:text: Jeffery Lee; The William C. Holman Correctional Facility in Atmore, Ala.
media:content.media:description: Jeffery Lee; The William C. Holman Correctional Facility in Atmore, Ala.

media:content.media:text: Jeffery Lee.
media:content.media:description: Jeffery Lee.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy Office of the Alabama Attorney General
media:content.media:text: Jimmy Ellis
media:content.media:description: Jimmy Ellis owned Jimmy’s Pawn Shop in Orrville, Ala.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy Office of the Alabama Attorney General
media:content.media:text: Elaine Thompson was shot and killed in Jimmy’s Pawn Shop in Orrville, Ala., in 1998.
media:content.media:description: Elaine Thompson worked at Jimmy's Pawn Shop.

item.title: Supreme Court denies Alabama’s attempt to execute Jeffery Lee by nitrogen gas

item.description: Legendary golfer Phil Mickelson was kicked out of the San Diego club following allegations that he made inappropriate physical contact with a female employee, according to a report by Golf Digest. NBC News’ Emilie Ikeda reports.

media:content.media:title: Phil Mickelson banned from golf club over misconduct allegations
media:content.media:description: Legendary golfer Phil Mickelson was kicked out of the San Diego club following allegations that he made inappropriate physical contact with a female employee, according to a report by Golf Digest. NBC News’ Emilie Ikeda reports.

item.title: Phil Mickelson banned from golf club over misconduct allegations

item.dc:creator: Josh Cradduck
Ryan J. Reilly
Raquel Coronell Uribe
Monica Alba
item.description: A judge ruled this month that the numbers on their own, which the Trump administration has called a threat against the president, constitute free speech.

media:content.media:text: An aerial view of the National Mall in Washington D.C.
media:content.media:description: The numbers “8647” were marked in the grass on the National Mall in Washington on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: Law enforcement officials bent at the waist and examining the lawn in the National Mall.
media:content.media:description: The numbers “8647” were marked in the grass on the National Mall in Washington on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: Police investigators on the lawn of the National Mall.
media:content.media:description: The numbers “8647” were marked in the grass on the National Mall in Washington on Thursday.

item.title: Federal authorities investigate giant ‘8647’ markings on National Mall

item.dc:creator: Joelle Gross
Javier Zarracina
Jiachuan Wu
Ashley Mowreader
Joe Murphy
item.description: Elon Musk, currently worth $696 billion, is poised to become the world’s first trillionaire when SpaceX goes public Friday. Here’s how to visualize that level of wealth in charts and graphics.

media:content.media:text: $1.77 trillion (center), in stacked hundred dollar bills, compared to (from left) the Statue of Liberty, Elon Musk, $1.7 billion, a Tesla Model X and a SpaceX Starship.
media:content.media:description: $1.77 trillion (center), in stacked hundred dollar bills, compared to (from left) the Statue of Liberty, Elon Musk, $1.7 billion, a Tesla Model X and a SpaceX Starship.

media:content.media:text: $1.77 trillion (center), in stacked hundred dollar bills, compared to (from left) the Statue of Liberty, Elon Musk, $1.7 billion, a Tesla Model X and a SpaceX Starship.
media:content.media:description: $1.77 trillion (center), in stacked hundred dollar bills, compared to (from left) the Statue of Liberty, Elon Musk, $1.7 billion, a Tesla Model X and a SpaceX Starship.

media:content.media:text: A three-dimensional rendering of the Statue of Liberty, $1.77 trillion in stacked hundred dollar bills, a SpaceX rocket and other comparable items.
media:content.media:description: $1.77 trillion (center), in stacked hundred dollar bills, compared to (from left) the Statue of Liberty, Elon Musk, $1.7 billion, a Tesla Model X and a SpaceX Starship.

item.title: 1,000,000,000,000 (that’s 1 trillion), in graphics

item.description: Elon Musk’s SpaceX will begin trading with a price set at $135 per share, giving the company a valuation of $1.77 trillion and making it the largest-ever stock debut. NBC News’ Allie Canal explains.

media:content.media:title: SpaceX sets IPO price at $135
media:content.media:description: Elon Musk’s SpaceX will begin trading with a price set at $135 per share, giving the company a valuation of $1.77 trillion and making it the largest-ever stock debut. NBC News’ Allie Canal explains.

item.title: SpaceX sets IPO price at $135

item.dc:creator: Evan Bush
item.description: Prepare for heat, drought and flooding — it’s officially El Niño season, according to the National Weather Service. This one could be on par with some of the strongest.

media:content.media:text: Extreme heat warning in New York
media:content.media:description: People walk along the Brooklyn Bridge during an extreme heat warning in New York in July 2025.

item.title: El Niño is officially here, and this one could be a doozy

item.description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

media:content.media:title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final
media:content.media:description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

item.title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final

item.dc:creator: Yuliya Talmazan
item.description: The World Cup opened with jubilation in Mexico City as a packed stadium roared the hosts to victory.

media:content.media:text: Korea Republic v Czechia: Group A - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: General view inside the stadium as Matej Kovar #1 of Czechia passes the ball during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match between Korea Republic and Czechia at Guadalajara Stadium on June 11, 2026 in Guadalajara, Mexico.

media:content.media:text: Korea Republic v Czechia: Group A - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: The crowd that did show was primarily backing South Korea, and delighted in the comeback win.

media:content.media:text: Korea Republic v Czechia: Group A - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Guadalajara is a city with a deep-rooted football culture.

media:content.media:text: Korea Republic v Czechia: Group A - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: The game saw all three goals scored in the second half, with the Cezchs taking the lead from a long throw before the Koreans came back.

item.title: Empty seats on World Cup’s opening day renew ticket price concerns

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
item.description: Joseph Laedtke, 43, learned through an ancestry test that he had nine half-siblings, who he says connect back to his mother’s fertility doctor from the 1980s.

media:content.media:text: Joe and Mary Ellen Laedtke.
media:content.media:description: Joe and Mary Ellen Laedtke.

media:content.media:text: Joseph with his parents Mary Ellen Lukezich and her late husband, Thomas Laedtke.
media:content.media:description: Joe and Mary Ellen Laedtke.

item.title: Family alleges OB-GYN used his own sperm for insemination instead of agreed-upon donor’s

item.dc:creator: Alexander Smith
item.description: The iconic British contemporary artist David Hockney has died, his publicist said Friday.

media:content.media:text: Portrait Of David Hockney
media:content.media:description: David Hockney in his home in Los Angeles in 1987.

media:content.media:text: David Hockney exhibition in New York
media:content.media:description: David Hockney in his home in Los Angeles in 1987.

item.title: David Hockney, giant of British contemporary art, dies aged 88
